member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.CSharpClassesGenerator
member.summary: Generator for C# classes. Generation of single element is in CSharpHelper.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.CSharpClassesGenerator.Type
member.summary: Type information for runtime type checking.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.CSharpClassesGenerator.Dictionary(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Func{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a dictionary class with random values.
member.param: Name of the class to generate.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.CSharpClassesGenerator.Dictionary(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a dictionary class with specified keys and values.
member.param: Name of the class to generate.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.CSharpClassesGenerator.DictionaryPascalConvention(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a dictionary class with Pascal convention conversion.
member.param: Name of the class to generate.
List of items to convert and use as keys or values.
If true, switches keys and values in the dictionary.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem
member.summary: Represents an item in an enumeration with metadata.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem.Hex
member.summary: Gets or sets the hexadecimal value (without the initial 0x prefix).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the attributes dictionary for the enum item.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the enum item.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.EnumItem.Comment
member.summary: Gets or sets the comment for the enum item.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp
member.summary: C++ code generator for maps, vectors, and arrays.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp.MapStringString(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates a C++ map with string keys and string values.
member.param: Dictionary of key-value pairs to add to the map.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp.NewVariable(System.Int32,SunamoDevCode.Enums.AccessModifiers,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new variable declaration in C++.
member.param: Access modifier (not used in C++ the same way as C#).
Whether to create an instance (not used in current implementation).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp.MapNonStringNonString(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates a C++ map with custom key and value types.
member.param: Dictionary of key-value pairs to add to the map.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp.VectorCustom(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates a C++ vector with custom type.
member.param: Dictionary of key-value pairs to initialize the vector.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.GeneratorCpp.Array(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Generates a C++ array with custom type.
member.param: Dictionary of key-value pairs to initialize the array.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.SqlGenerator
member.summary: Generator for SQL queries.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.SqlGenerator.Select(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a SELECT * query for the specified table.
member.param: Name of the table to select from.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.SqlGenerator.ToString
member.summary: Returns the generated SQL as a string.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator
member.summary: Generator for TypeScript code.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.Interface(System.Boolean,System.String,SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoData.Data.TWithNameTDC{System.String}[])
member.summary: Generates a TypeScript interface.
member.param: If true, adds the export keyword.
Array of properties with their types.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.Append(System.String)
member.summary: Appends text to the generated code.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.AppendLine(System.String)
member.summary: Appends a line of text to the generated code.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.ClassVariable(System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode.Enums.TypesTs,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a TypeScript class variable declaration.
member.param: If true, adds the export keyword.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.ArrayWithKeyValueObjectStart(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Generates the start of a TypeScript array with key-value objects.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.ArrayWithKeyValueObjectEnd
member.summary: Generates the end of a TypeScript array with key-value objects.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.ToString
member.summary: Returns the generated TypeScript code as a string.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.Const(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a const field declaration.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.Let(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a let field declaration.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.Field(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a field declaration with specified keyword.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CodeGenerator.TypeScriptGenerator.AppendLine
member.summary: Appends an empty line to the generated code.
